integrations.empty: None of your organization's integrations can be configured with your personal credentials.

account.title: Account Settings
account.fullNameDescription: This is the name that will be displayed on your profile.
account.emailDescription: We'll send account-related emails to this address.
account.newPasswordDescription: Password must be at least 8 characters and include an uppercase letter, a lowercase letter, and a number.
account.deleteAccountDescription: Permanently delete your account and all associated data.

error.updateFailed: Failed to update. Please try again.
error.invalidPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters and include an uppercase letter, a lowercase letter, and a number.

mfa.title: Two-factor authentication
mfa.enabledDescription: Your account is protected with an authenticator app. {{count}} recovery codes remaining.
mfa.disabledDescription: Add a second login step with an authenticator app to protect your account.
mfa.enableDialogDescription: Scan the QR code and confirm with a code from your authenticator app.
mfa.recoveryCodesDescription: Save your recovery codes before closing this dialog.
mfa.disableDialogDescription: Enter a code from your authenticator app (or a recovery code) to confirm.

error.invalidCode: That code is not valid. Please try again.
error.locked: Too many failed attempts. Please wait 15 minutes.
error.requiredByOrg: Your organization requires two-factor authentication — it cannot be disabled.
error.unexpected: Something went wrong. Please try again.
error.statusFailed: Could not load the two-factor status. Please reload the page.

general.title: General Settings
general.darkModeDescription: Switch between light and dark themes
general.displayLanguageDescription: Choose the language for menus and messages

chat.title: Chat Settings
chat.defaultModelDescription: Choose the default AI model for new conversations
chat.systemPromptDescription: Define a personal system prompt that gets injected into every AI conversation. Use this to customize AI behavior to your preferences.
chat.systemPromptPlaceholder: e.g. Always respond in bullet points. I work in the finance department.
